case_title: BRETT SCOVIL JR. VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ORDER CONTINUING CASE MGMT CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOVIL JR., BRETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-01-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. BY COURT. PER ORDER FILED DECEMBER 18, 2014, THIS CASE HAS BEEN ADDED TO JUDICIAL COUNCIL COORDINATION PROCEEDING NO. 4631, REGLAN/METOCLOPRAMIDE CASES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-03-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-01-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF COORDINATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOVIL JR., BRETT AS TO DEFENDANT WYETH LLC JOHN DOE DRUG COMPANY DEFENDANTS (1-500) JANE DOE DRUG DISTRIBUTOR DEFENDANTS (1-500) JIM DOE HEALTH CARE PROVIDERS (1-500) JILL DOE (1-500) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-10-2014 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
